heading: Filing of maps and descriptions
label: 460ll–4 Filing of maps and descriptions
text: As soon as practicable after , a map and legal description of the Rattlesnake National Recreational Area and a map and legal description of the Rattlesnake Wilderness shall be filed with the Committee on Interior and Insular Affairs of the House of Representatives and the Committee on Energy and Natural Resources of the United States Senate, and such maps and legal descriptions shall have the same force and effect as if included in this subchapter: , That correction of clerical and typographical errors in such legal descriptions and maps may be made.October 19, 1980Provided, however
notes: Change of NameCommittee on Interior and Insular Affairs of the House of Representatives changed to Committee on Natural Resources of the House of Representatives on , by House Resolution No. 5, One Hundred Third Congress.Jan. 5, 1993
